task.title: Write feedback compiler skill contract
task.summary: Define feedback-mode agent instructions so semantic user intent is captured through `codewiki_diff_table` before `feedback_build` creation.

goal.outcome: Feedback mode makes semantic diff rows, explicit user acceptance, and `feedback_build` creation mandatory and unambiguous.
acceptance: `codewiki-feedback` skill frontmatter has a specific trigger for ambiguous intent, semantic proposals, requirement changes, and user approval decisions.
Instructions require `codewiki_diff_table` for proposed semantic changes and require accepted rows before `codewiki_build kind=feedback`.
Instructions define when feedback validation happens, what evidence is required, and when the agent must stop instead of writing lower-layer docs/code.
non_goals: Do not edit documentation, planning, implementation, or validation loop content except a route pointer needed by feedback mode.
Do not create roadmap tasks from unaccepted feedback rows.
verification: Run package skill asset smoke coverage after adding/updating tests.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Superseded TASK-093 implementation build with accepted planning-build traceability while preserving feedback compiler skill contract evidence.
checks_run: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack

evidence: Prompt/package smoke tests cover the new public skill surface, README references, and package skill reachability.
TASK-076 restructure test covers package-local skill routing and link constraints.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Added dedicated `codewiki-feedback` public skill and reference.
Updated feedback loop doc, main skill routing, README, and tests.
notes: Metadata remediation only: source content unchanged from original TASK-093 implementation; added accepted planning-build traceability for validation policy.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Prompt/package smoke tests cover the new public skill surface, README references, and package skill reachability.
TASK-076 restructure test covers package-local skill routing and link constraints.
code_change_evidence: Added dedicated `codewiki-feedback` public skill and reference.
Updated feedback loop doc, main skill routing, README, and tests.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: `codewiki-feedback` skill frontmatter has a specific trigger for ambiguous intent, semantic proposals, requirement changes, and user approval decisions.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Created `skills/codewiki-feedback/SKILL.md` with `name: codewiki-feedback` and trigger description for ambiguous intent, semantic change proposals, requirements, direction, and approval before canonical changes.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Instructions require `codewiki_diff_table` for proposed semantic changes and accepted rows before `codewiki_build kind=feedback`.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `skills/codewiki-feedback/SKILL.md` and `skills/codewiki-feedback/references/tools.md` define diff-table propose/accept/reject/defer/revise flow and accepted rows before `feedback_build`.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Instructions define feedback validation evidence and stop conditions instead of writing lower-layer docs/code.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Feedback skill workflow and `skills/codewiki/loops/feedback.md` define validation/routing rules, stop conditions, output contract, and forbidden feedback-mode writes.

closure_brief.user_intent: Create a focused feedback compiler skill contract for ambiguous intent, semantic proposals, and approval decisions before lower-layer CodeWiki changes.
implemented_changes: Added dedicated `codewiki-feedback` public skill with exact feedback compiler workflow.
Added feedback tool reference requiring `codewiki_diff_table` before `feedback_build`.
Updated legacy feedback loop guidance, main skill routing, README, and tests for the new skill surface.
Superseded the original implementation build with accepted planning-build traceability.
acceptance_evidence: Feedback skill frontmatter triggers on intended feedback compiler cases.
Diff-table and feedback-build ordering is explicit.
Feedback stop conditions and validation routing are documented.
Accepted planning build is cited by this implementation build.

remaining_risks: Clean immutable proof needed before task-close/publication.
